title: build-using-dockerfile: set the 'author' field for MAINTAINER
body:
When we encounter the MAINTAINER keyword in a Dockerfile, imagebuilder updates the Author field in the imagebuilder.Builder structure.  Pick up that value when we go to commit the image.

This should fix #448.

comments.body:
Tests fail due to:
```
run buildah --debug=false inspect --type=image --format '{{.Docker.Author}}' $(buildah --debug=false images -q)
```
Whoops, forgot to commit the fix for that.  Should be fixed now.

:pushpin: Commit 087d57b has been approved by `rhatdan`
